route: Yanbu -> Vadinar via Red Sea & Arabian Sea
diversification_value: medium - Middle East source but bypasses Hormuz corridor
description: Loaded from the Red Sea terminal of Yanbu via the East-West pipeline, avoiding the Strait of Hormuz completely.

route: Fujairah -> Jamnagar via Gulf of Oman
diversification_value: medium - Middle East source but loaded outside Hormuz
description: Murban crude piped to Fujairah terminal outside the Persian Gulf, bypassing the Strait of Hormuz.

route: Basra Terminal -> Vadinar via Strait of Hormuz
tanker_availability_status: 1 VLCC available within 96h due to regional risk
diversification_value: low - route transits the disrupted Strait of Hormuz
description: Standard loading from Basra terminal. Highly exposed to Hormuz disruption, incurring heavy risk premiums and shipping delays.

route: Primorsk -> Vadinar via Cape of Good Hope
diversification_value: high - fully independent of Middle East supply routes
description: Urals crude shipped from Primorsk on the Baltic Sea via the Cape route. Subject to significant sanctions oversight and G7 price cap compliance, but highly discounted.

diversification_value: high - fully independent of Middle East supply routes
description: Urals crude shipped from Novorossiysk on the Black Sea via the Suez Canal. Fast transit, but carries sanctions compliance friction.

route: Kozmino -> Paradip via South China Sea & Malacca Strait
description: Eastern Siberia-Pacific Ocean (ESPO) crude loaded at Kozmino. Quick transit to India's East Coast, but limited by smaller tanker class (Aframax) and partial sanctions friction.

route: Bonny Terminal -> Jamnagar via Cape of Good Hope
diversification_value: high - Atlantic basin sourcing completely independent of Middle East
description: High quality light sweet crude. Excellent compatibility but subject to spot market price volatility and Cape transit times.

route: Girassol Terminal -> Vadinar via Cape of Good Hope
diversification_value: high - West African source outside geopolitical choke points
description: Good grade match for complex refiners requiring medium sweet crudes. Smooth logistics and low geopolitical risk.

route: Houston -> Paradip via Cape of Good Hope
description: Abundant light sweet crude. Extremely stable supply chain and low transaction friction, but has the longest shipping route.

route: Santos Terminal -> Jamnagar via Cape of Good Hope
diversification_value: high - Latin American supply outside Middle East risk
description: Highly liquid Brazilian medium sweet crude. Good match for blending or direct processing in complex refineries.
